decision_record.query: Did intervention X cause outcome Y?

speaker_intent.source_wording: Did intervention X cause outcome Y?
intended_referent_candidates: measured outcome Y under the tested conditions
speaker_intent.selected_or_inferred_referent: measured outcome Y under the tested conditions
speaker_intent.requested_scope: the tested intervention, population, comparator, conditions, and time horizon

target_identities.speaker_intended_referent: the directly measured organism outcome under the tested conditions
target_identities.source_defined_target: the directly measured outcome specified by the intervention protocol
exact_relations_after_label_removal: assignment to intervention X versus comparator changed the directly measured organism outcome under the tested conditions
target_identities.generator_pointer: the protocol outcome definition and direct measurement procedure
target_identities.boundary_conditions_and_regime: the tested population, comparator, intervention dose, timing, and measurement conditions
measurement_or_construction_operations: direct measurement of the prespecified outcome Y
target_identities.operational_equivalence_evidence: one direct outcome definition was used consistently across the controlled comparison
target_identities.heterogeneity_generator: response heterogeneity was bounded by the full reported distribution under the tested conditions
target_identities.transport_status: identity and causal scope are limited to the tested conditions

admitted_observations: The controlled manipulation changed outcome Y under the tested conditions.

segments.physical_change: specified intervention altered local electrical conditions
segments.carrier_or_constraint: applied field and induced ionic current
segments.target_state: measured organism outcome Y under the tested conditions
segments.conditions: controlled comparison with durable replicated response

unresolved_slots: exact chemical and metabolic route between local perturbation and organism outcome

metabolic_binding.physical_or_chemical_input: specified stimulation waveform delivered to tissue
metabolic_binding.energetic_or_material_carrier: electrical field and induced ionic current
metabolic_binding.metabolic_state_change: unresolved: exact energetic and substrate reweighting was not measured
metabolic_binding.biological_operation: unresolved: transition-level tissue operation was not measured
metabolic_binding.organism_state_or_behavior: measured outcome Y under the tested conditions

claims.text: Intervention X caused outcome Y under the tested conditions.
The physical manipulation altered local electrical conditions, but the intervening change in metabolically maintained state remains unresolved.

rendered_answer: Intervention X caused outcome Y under the tested conditions. The physical manipulation altered local electrical conditions, but the intervening change in metabolically maintained state remains unresolved.
